Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters to us. This page explains exactly how we handle your information.

Last updated: January 1, 2025

This Privacy Policy describes how Animals World collects, uses, and shares information when you visit our website. By using the Site, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

1. Information We Collect

  • Automatically collected data: IP address, browser type, pages viewed, and time spent on the Site — collected through cookies and tracking technologies.
  • Cookies: Small text files stored on your device to understand how visitors interact with our Site.
  • Contact information: If you email us, we collect your email address and message content to respond to you.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • Understand how visitors use our Site and improve our content
  • Respond to messages or inquiries
  • Analyze traffic and optimize Site performance
  • Comply with applicable legal obligations

We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

3. Google Analytics

We use Google Analytics to track website traffic in aggregate. This data is anonymized and used solely to improve our content. You can opt out via the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

4. Google AdSense

We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google AdSense may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits. You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ads Settings.

5. Third-Party Services

Third-party services we use include: Google Analytics, Google AdSense, and Google Fonts. Each has its own privacy policy.

6. Cookies and Your Choices

You can disable cookies in your browser settings. Some features may not function correctly if cookies are disabled.

7. Children's Privacy

Our Site is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

8. Your Rights

You may have the right to access, correct, or delete information we hold about you. Contact us at contact@HappyPetAdvice.com.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "last updated" date at the top will reflect changes.

10. Contact Us

Questions? Email us at contact@HappyPetAdvice.com.

🐾 AnimalsWorld

Practical, compassionate advice for dog and cat owners. We believe that understanding your pet's needs is the foundation of a happy life together.
